About Me
I am Kaung Zaw Thant and I am
Born in 2001 and finished High School in 2018, I'm currently studying at YTU as a Computer Science Student. I joined AIESEC in Myanmar organization at January 2019 as a Value Delivery Member and left at July 2020. During AIESEC membership, I participated as an OC(Organizing Committee) member for three events: YouthSpeak Forum Tour: Economic Growth in the Age of Big Data , YouthSpeak Forum: Building Healthy Community through Leadership and Virtual Youth Cafe: Oppurtunites and the Future. Photography and coding being my hobbies, I'm now currently working as a freelancer.
